hero.fallbackSubtitle: Experience authentic local hospitality, community activities and unforgettable adventures in the heart of Phong Nha.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: More than a place to stay — a home shaped by nature, family, and community.
story.excerpt: Green Riverside Cosy Home began as a family dream beside the Son River. Today we welcome travellers from around the world with warm hospitality, home-cooked meals, and adventures that reveal the soul of Phong Nha.

whyStay.title: Why Stay With Us
whyStay.subtitle: Authentic hospitality, social energy, and nature at your doorstep.

items.title: Riverside Location
items.description: Wake up beside the Son River with limestone peaks on the horizon — nature outside your door.

items.title: Social Community
items.description: Family dinners, rooftop happy hours, and weekly events where solo travellers instantly feel at home.

items.title: Local Family Hospitality
items.description: Run by a Vietnamese family who share honest recommendations, home cooking, and genuine care.

items.title: Adventure Hub
items.description: Book caves, tours, and transport directly with us — no booking fees, no middleman.

items.title: Rooftop Café
items.description: Sunrise coffee, Vietnamese breakfast, and sunset cocktails with river and mountain views.

items.title: Book Direct & Save
items.description: WhatsApp us for the best rates, flexible plans, and personal help planning your Phong Nha stay.

items.question: How do I book a room?
items.answer: Message us on WhatsApp for the fastest response. We confirm availability and rates directly — no booking fees, no middleman.

items.question: Is breakfast included?
items.answer: Yes. Every guest enjoys complimentary breakfast each morning at our rooftop café, with Vietnamese and international options.

items.question: Can you help arrange tours?
items.answer: Absolutely. We book all major Phong Nha cave tours and adventures. Tell us your dates and interests — we handle the rest.

items.question: How do I get to Phong Nha?
items.answer: We offer airport and train station transfers from Dong Hoi. Sleeper buses from Hanoi, Hue, and Da Nang are also available — just ask.

items.question: Is Green Riverside good for solo travellers?
items.answer: We're one of Phong Nha's most social stays. Daily activities, family dinners, and a welcoming community make it easy to meet people.

terms.metaTitle: Terms & Conditions | Green Riverside Cosy Home
terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for booking and staying at Green Riverside Cosy Home in Phong Nha, Vietnam.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.body: By booking with Green Riverside Cosy Home, you agree to our house rules, cancellation policy, and payment terms provided at the time of reservation. Rates, availability, and inclusions may change without prior notice until a booking is confirmed. We reserve the right to refuse service in cases of unsafe or disruptive behaviour. For questions about these terms, please contact us before your stay.

privacy.metaTitle: Privacy Policy | Green Riverside Cosy Home
privacy.metaDescription: How Green Riverside Cosy Home collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: We collect only the information needed to process bookings and respond to enquiries, such as your name, contact details, and stay preferences. We do not sell your personal data. Information may be shared with service partners only when necessary to fulfil your reservation. You may request access to or correction of your data by contacting us directly. We use reasonable measures to keep your information secure.
